rules.title: Propane Tank Mounting
rules.description: Propane (LPG) tanks must be securely mounted to the exterior of the vehicle or in a vented compartment with 2+ air vents. Maximum 2 tanks, 100 lbs each.

rules.title: Park Proximity — Propane
rules.description: Propane-fueled cooking equipment shall not be operated within 50 feet of a public park, playground, or outdoor assembly area.

rules.title: Fire Suppression Hood
rules.description: Any cooking operation that produces grease-laden vapors (frying, grilling) must have a UL-300 listed automatic fire suppression system installed above the cooking surface.

rules.title: Fire Extinguisher Requirement
rules.description: A minimum of one 2A:10-B:C rated portable fire extinguisher must be mounted within 25 feet of any cooking equipment. Inspected annually.

rules.title: Generator Placement
rules.description: Portable generators must be positioned at least 10 feet from any structure, tent, or combustible material. Fuel storage limited to 10 gallons.

rules.title: Emergency Exit Clearance
rules.description: All food service establishments must maintain a clear, unobstructed path of egress with minimum 36-inch width at all times.

rules.title: Occupancy Load Posting
rules.description: Establishments with occupancy exceeding 49 persons must post the maximum occupancy load as determined by the Fire Marshal.

rules.title: Ventilation Requirements
rules.description: Commercial kitchens must have a mechanical exhaust ventilation system providing a minimum of 150 CFM per linear foot of cooking equipment.
